gorgias-shoebacca.note: All 5 themes answered; product cards w/ strikethrough prices (AP1 $85/$44.97, Daily 4.0 $64.95), free-shipping + $10-off-$60 welcome facts, quality reasoning; admits no review scores; no handover.

gorgias-jade.note: 4/5 themes self-served w/ named products + price cards (vinyl £25.99, tote £30, Encore £70) + chips; honest no-cart/no-reviews; beginner theme had a soft 'agent joining' stall.

gorgias-babybee.note: Named products w/ cards (ALTO/ROVER3/JOEY + prices) + chips; no handover; dinged for repeated business-hours boilerplate padding and no reviews cited.

envive-kut.note: Names specific fits (Meg, Diana, Ashton, Catherine) w/ price ($119) + fit compare + shipping; text-only, no cards, admits no review data; problem-solver theme handed to offline email.

siena-simplemodern.note: Names Mesa Loop 30oz / Trek Tumbler w/ View-Product cards + prices + reviews (4.7/4.8, 5,300+); but everyday-value theme loops asking category and problem-solver ends in email handover.

kodif-dsc.note: Names Fully Loaded Starter Set ($39.99), Signature 6 Blade + cites review phrases; text/link only, no cards; problem-solver theme handed to a live agent on returns and no cart.

sierra-casper.note: Only beginner theme captured, but it is strong: product cards w/ Add-to-Cart (The One, Cloud One) + sale prices (Queen $899/$1,149) + specs + reviews; other 4 themes failed to capture.

humind-chaiselongue.note: Only 3 real turns captured (1/theme) but each renders product-card ids + value reasoning + add-to-cart nudge; too thin to confirm multi-turn depth; no handover in captured turns.

gorgias-madura.note: Better than prior seed: gift theme names products + price + URL + shipping total (Lou ficelle 253 EUR); but compare/everyday themes deflect to 'which category' and two themes fully hand off to email.

dg-bloomwild.note: Fluent category guidance (letterbox vs subscription) but only generic types, no named SKUs/prices/cards/reviews; every add-to-cart / budget close triggers an agent handover (11 human turns).

sierra-scotts.note: Heavily deflective: repeats 'which category are you shopping for?' across most turns instead of recommending; does surface product cards late (AeroGarden $124.95, Miracle-Gro) in gift/problem-solver; no handover.

repai-fresh.note: Generic loop — never names a product, just repeats 'Auto Deliver / 30% first-month savings / want a rundown?'; no cards/reviews; no handover but essentially non-answers.

siena-figs.note: Problem-solver only; near-total deflection to an offline email ticket ('team is offline, we've created a ticket'), never answers the shopping question; final turn is generic clear-your-cache advice.

siena-simplemodern.note: All 5 themes self-served w/ precise policy (90-day returns, 45min/1hr cancel windows, Buy-More-Save-More tiers, damage-claim vs return distinction, US/Canada shipping); no handover. Supersedes seed 61 with fuller data.

dg-bloomwild.note: Order-mgmt & policy fully self-served w/ exact facts (cancel windows, ship countries, payment/loyalty); but tracking & damaged loop asking for order#/postcode without resolving, and returns is a full handover (11 human turns).

gorgias-beekman.note: Specific grounded facts across all themes (damaged=no return needed + photo, $8 return fee, 1hr cancel, 5-10day refund, 20% July sale, tracking timing); no handover; minor 'message not delivered' first turns.

gorgias-babybee.note: 34 real turns, fully self-served, no handover; where visible facts are specific (returns portal, no intl shipping, Alma, tracking) but many replies truncated to AI/business-hours boilerplate in capture.

sierra-casper.note: Returns theme excellent (100-night/30-day trials, free return shipping, refund timing) + specific payment/shipping facts; but damaged & tracking themes hand off to a live Sleep Specialist (15 human turns) and order-mgmt failed to capture. Supersedes seed 98.

gorgias-madura.note: Policy & order-mgmt excellent (customs by country, Alma, 14-day/14-working-day refund, cancel windows) but damaged/returns/tracking hand off to agent Sébastien (15 human turns) — containment failed. Supersedes seed 51 with fuller data.

gorgias-shoebacca.note: Only 6 real turns: damaged answers 2 then routes to email, tracking gives specific shipping-speed facts (4 turns); order-mgmt full handover w/ phone number, policy empty, returns empty — weak containment.
